# UNDRGRND Movement — LLM Context File
# https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/llms.txt

## Business

- **Name:** UNDRGRND Movement
- **Type:** Dance and movement studio
- **Location:** 163 Ferry Rd, Southport QLD 4215, Australia
- **Region:** Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia
- **Email:** olga.coaching1@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://www.undrgrnd.com.au

## About

UNDRGRND Movement is a Gold Coast dance and movement studio based in Southport, Queensland. The studio offers adult and children's classes across dance, pole fitness, yoga, aerial arts, and recovery movement. Classes are beginner-friendly, trauma-informed, and designed for personal transformation rather than performance or competition.

The studio is founded and led by Ollie, a certified yoga instructor, movement practitioner, performance coach, and trauma-informed movement specialist.

## Programs — Adults

- Afro Groove Foundations (Dance, Beginner)
- Movement Dance (Dance, All Levels)
- Recovery Movement (Dance/Therapy, Medical Clearance Required)
- Pole Fitness Foundations (Pole, Beginner)
- Pole Flow (Pole, Intermediate)
- Pole Strength & Movement (Pole, All Levels)
- Yoga Fusion (Yoga, All Levels)
- Traditional Yoga (Yoga, All Levels)
- Modern Yoga (Yoga, All Levels)
- Aerial Yoga (Aerial/Yoga, All Levels)
- Aerial Silks (Aerial, Beginner–Intermediate)
- Choreography Fusion (Choreography, Intermediate)

## Programs — Kids (Ages 4–16)

- Kids Yoga (Ages 4–12)
- Kids Aerial Yoga (Ages 6–14)
- Kids Pole Foundations (Ages 8–16)
- Kids Aerial Silks (Ages 8–16)
- Kids Dance Moves (Ages 4–10)
- Kids Modern & Contemporary (Ages 10–16)
- Kids Creative Dance (Ages 4–8)

## SEO Keywords

Gold Coast dance studio, Southport dance classes, pole fitness Gold Coast, aerial silks Gold Coast, yoga classes Southport, kids dance classes Gold Coast, beginner dance classes Gold Coast, UNDRGRND Movement

## Philosophy

UNDRGRND Movement believes movement is for every body. The studio prioritises personal transformation over performance, offers a judgment-free environment, and welcomes complete beginners. Classes are held at the Southport studio, with additional ocean-side and outdoor sessions available.

## Legal

- Privacy Act 1988 (Australia) compliant
- Australian Privacy Principles
- Medical clearance required for Recovery Movement classes
- All instructors are fully insured and qualified
